name: Zoe Lofgren
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $344,466 for Zoe Lofgren in U.S. House, CA-18. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
